response.overview: The story of Pak Murad and Mak Jah who divorced after 30 years of married life. Once they were the most romantic couple in the village. The cause of their divorce was Pak Murad's jealousy over him spending too much time at the widow's stall after his retirement. Their children and grandchildren will not return to the village for the holidays until the two of them reconcile. Finally, they got back together after Pak Murad cared for Mak Jah's injured foot and they still loved each other dearly. Their children and grandchildren returned to the village for the holidays together.
response.title: Nak Salam Boleh
